title: achillea lingulata var. buglossis
intro: Achillea lingulata var. buglossis, also known as yarrow, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling, ease pain, and prevent infection. The health benefits of yarrow include reducing menstrual cramps, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Yarrow can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in aromatherapy and herbal medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
